response.justification: Strong full-stack profile with deep experience across the required primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and adjacent backend languages (Java, Python implied via broad polyglot background). Demonstrates architecture ownership, AI-agent/MCP tooling exposure aligning with the AI agent requirement, and long tenure showing reliability. Some resume inconsistencies in dates and a heavy DLang footprint warrant clarification, but overall fit is high for a mid-senior IC role.
strengths: Hands-on TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus current AI-agent and MCP tooling work
Polyglot background (TS, Java, D, C/C++, Python-adjacent) with cloud/Docker/Kubernetes exposure
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops on testing
concerns: Resume timeline has overlapping/implausible dates (e.g., roles dating to the 1990s) that need verification
No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed; PostgreSQL not mentioned (MongoDB/MySQL only)
Kotlin not mentioned; secondary backend stack coverage is partial

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, PostgreSQL specifics
